## Summary

- explain the operational reason for the change
- call out any trust-boundary, storage, or release-surface impact

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] additional manual verification documented below

## Manual checks

- note any browser-specific, storage-specific, or release-specific checks run

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] ADR or docs updated if architecture, recovery, or trust boundaries changed
